mapper.sql: FROM sys_exception_log t WHERE t.enabled = '1' ORDER BY t.id DESC
mapper.select:
SELECT sel.username, sel.exception_type, sel.ip, sel.location, sel.browser, sel.os, sel.create_time, su.id AS user_id, IFNULL(su.blacklist_status, 0) AS blacklist_status FROM sys_exception_log sel LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON sel.username = su.username WHERE sel.enabled = '1'
AND sel.create_time BETWEEN #{req.startTime} AND #{req.endTime}
AND sel.username like CONCAT(#{req.username}, '%')
ORDER BY sel.id DESC
